blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,579 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
